title: Crystalline
description: A Mod about amethyst and crystals
body:
## CRYSTALLINE
crystalline is a mod about amethyst, adding multiple amethyst building blocks and also adding 2 new amethyst weapons.


## **The Divider** :

  - A amethyst longsword, Attack to charge up the longsword by 1, Right click to shoot a Amethyst shard.

**AMETHYST RAIN** :
  - Shoot a much larger wave of shards on full charge.

**SHATTER SWEEP** :
  - Shoot 5-6 shards instead of 1 at the cost of 4 charge.

## **The Crusher**

  - A mace equivalent that shoot crystals instead of building up damage

**GRAVITATE** :
  -  Pulls surrounding entities towards you
    
## **Blocks**

  - Amethyst Brick Block set

  - Amethyst Block Set

  - Amethyst Lamp

## Importent Information
  this mod will not be ported to forge or backported to older versions of minecraft.
  this mod is licensed under **ALL RIGHTS RESERVED** and you are not allowed to reuse its assets or code nor are you allowed to port/fork it to older versions or other modloaders, but you may put it in modpacks/servers.
